title: The New Silk Road, a New Model for International Relations
description: Schiller Institute founder Helga Zepp-LaRouche keynotes the Schiller Institute's conference, "Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind", in Bad Soden, Germany, November 25 & 26, 2017. For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/
